'''Oolas''' was the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Steadfast (carrier)|''Steadfast'']] during [[Operation Flotsam]]. He came from a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that had never been occupied by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. His [[Species/Legends|species]] possessed upper [[Limb/Legends|tentacles]] and a narrow neck.

==Biography==
In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], Oolas served in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]] as [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the ''Steadfast''. Together with [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Norda Proi]], he and his team destroyed a couple of [[Imperial Remnant|Remnant]] [[Starship/Legends|ships]] in order to search them for information, for which the ''Steadfast'' was equipped with the latest technology. This mission was known as [[Operation Flotsam]]. Thus, the Republic acted on the appearance of artifacts that both the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] had kept on the [[Black market/Legends|black market]].
